name: Protege XM
comment: Protégé XM: The Protégé XM’s advanced color system includes disc-based CMY color mixing, complemented by two color wheels, each loaded with nine vibrant dichroic filters, including a 2700K CTO filter for warm white output. Creative flexibility is enhanced further through dual rotating GOBO wheels – each featuring seven high-definition, replaceable glass GOBOs—allowing for intricate layered textures and dynamic mid-air effects. Its extensive effects engine features dual 6-facet prisms (linear and circular), which can be overlaid for complex refraction patterns, as well as two variable frost filters for smooth diffusion and an animation wheel for evolving motion graphics.

capabilities.comment: Random Strobe Effect Slow to Fast
All on - all in - all out (fast - slow)
Half open - full access - half open (fast - slow)
Half open - all out - half open (fast - slow)

capability.comment: CMY / Color Macro Speed Max -> Min

capabilities.comment: Effect Reset 2 (Prism Frost Focus and Zoom)

gwSpecs.description: The Protégé XM’s advanced color system includes disc-based CMY color mixing, complemented by two color wheels, each loaded with nine vibrant dichroic filters, including a 2700K CTO filter for warm white output. Creative flexibility is enhanced further through dual rotating GOBO wheels – each featuring seven high-definition, replaceable glass GOBOs—allowing for intricate layered textures and dynamic mid-air effects. Its extensive effects engine features dual 6-facet prisms (linear and circular), which can be overlaid for complex refraction patterns, as well as two variable frost filters for smooth diffusion and an animation wheel for evolving motion graphics.
